title: Norrköping, Östergötland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Norrköping, Östergötland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Norrköping is a city in Östergötland with a population of 143,000. An industrial city transformed into a cultural hub, known for its industrial landscape and university.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
